info.name: Price Provider Service API
info.description: Complete REST API collection for Price Provider Service with all endpoints including RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Keycloak OIDC login. Run "Get Admin Access Token" first to populate {{accessToken}}. All Admin API requests then inherit Bearer auth from the collection level automatically.

request.description:
Obtains a JWT access token from Keycloak using the Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) grant.

The `access_token` from the response is stored in the `{{accessToken}}` variable and automatically used as Bearer auth for all Admin API requests in this collection.

Requires Keycloak running at {{keycloakUrl}} with the `priceprovider` realm imported (see `idp/keycloak/realm-export.json` and `docker-compose.yml`).
Obtains a JWT access token for customer-city-health user.
Check if the service is running and healthy

exec: pm.test('response is valid json', function () { pm.response.to.be.json; });

request.description: Attempts to bulk delete EUR which is referenced by countries (DE, AT, FI, CH). Expects 409 Conflict. The error response contains message-key 'common.errors.dataIntegrity.referencedByEntity', the ids of the blocked currencies, and the referencedBy entity type ('Country').

exec: pm.test('contains message-key invalidOperator', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('$messages'); pm.expect(json['$messages'].length).to.be.above(0); pm.expect(json['$messages'][0]['message-key']).to.include('invalidOperator'); });

item.name: Public Price API
item.description: Public read-only API for third-party services (Shop, PIM) to query prices

item.name: FORCE_GROSS: Get Best Price DE/EUR (gross price returned as-is)

request.description: dach-sales-channel uses FORCE_GROSS mode. EUR prices are stored as gross (taxIncluded=true). Result is passed through as gross.

item.name: FORCE_GROSS: Get Best Price with Group (PREMIUM, DE/EUR)

request.description: FORCE_GROSS mode: group-specific price for PREMIUM group in DE/EUR.
FORCE_GROSS: all ranked prices for DEMO-PRODUCT-001 via DACH channel. All results should be gross.

exec: pm.test('All items are gross (taxIncluded=true)', () => { const items = pm.response.json().items; pm.expect(items.length).to.be.above(0); items.forEach(i => pm.expect(i.taxIncluded).to.be.true); });

item.name: FORCE_GROSS: Get All Prices with Group (PREMIUM, DE/EUR)

request.description: FORCE_GROSS: all ranked prices for DEMO-PRODUCT-001 with PREMIUM group via DACH channel.

item.name: FORCE_NET: Get Best Price US/USD - gross price converted to net

request.description: global-b2b-sales-channel uses FORCE_NET mode. DEMO-PRODUCT-003 USD 2026 price is stored as gross (taxIncluded=true, 170.00 USD, us-sales-tax 7%). The API converts it to net: 170.00 / 1.07 ≈ 158.88 USD.

item.name: FORCE_NET: Get Best Price US/USD - net price returned as-is

request.description: global-b2b-sales-channel uses FORCE_NET mode. DEMO-PRODUCT-001 USD prices are stored as net (taxIncluded=false). They are passed through unchanged.

item.name: FORCE_NET: Get Best Price US/USD DEMO-PRODUCT-002 - gross converted to net

request.description: global-b2b-sales-channel uses FORCE_NET mode. DEMO-PRODUCT-002 USD 2026 price is stored as gross (taxIncluded=true, 37.79 USD). The API converts it to net: 37.79 / 1.07 ≈ 35.32 USD.

item.name: FORCE_NET: Get All Prices US/USD DEMO-PRODUCT-003 (all ranked prices)

request.description: FORCE_NET: all ranked USD prices for DEMO-PRODUCT-003 via global-b2b channel. All prices (including gross ones) should be returned as net.

exec: pm.test('All items are net (taxIncluded=false)', () => { const items = pm.response.json().items; pm.expect(items.length).to.be.above(0); items.forEach(i => pm.expect(i.taxIncluded).to.be.false); });

item.name: FORCE_NET: Get Best Price with Group (PREMIUM, US/USD)

request.description: FORCE_NET: group-specific price for PREMIUM group in US/USD via global-b2b channel.

item.name: FORCE_GROSS: Get Best Price CH/CHF (DACH channel Switzerland)

request.description: FORCE_GROSS: CHF price for Switzerland via DACH channel.
FORCE_GROSS: purchase price for DEMO-PRODUCT-001 in DE/EUR.
FORCE_GROSS: material cost for DEMO-PRODUCT-001 in DE/EUR.
FORCE_GROSS: all purchase prices for DEMO-PRODUCT-001 in DE/EUR.
US country is not in dach-sales-channel's allowedCountryRefs. Should return 404.

exec: pm.test('Status 404 - country not in channel', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));
